name: TaxiServiceKSA
description: AI agent for discovering and booking taxi and transportation services across Saudi Arabia, including airport transfers, intercity routes, and VIP transfers to Makkah and Madinah.

supportedInterfaces.description: Online booking form for taxi services

skills.name: Book Taxi Transfer
skills.description: Book a private taxi transfer between Saudi cities, airports (Jeddah, Riyadh, Madinah), and holy sites including Makkah and Madinah

skills.name: Get Transfer Quote
skills.description: Get a price quote for taxi transfers in Saudi Arabia with fixed rates

skills.name: Browse Available Routes
skills.description: View all available taxi routes, distances, and pricing across Saudi Arabia

skills.name: Browse Vehicle Fleet
skills.description: View available vehicle types including sedans, SUVs, and vans with capacity information
